content: ytai-analizer es un monorepo pnpm con apps/api (Fastify + TypeScript) y apps/web (React + Vite). Entry points: apps/api/src/server.ts y apps/web/src/App.tsx. Flujo principal: UI llama POST /api/analyze -> API resuelve canal/videos con youtubeService; luego UI crea job con POST /api/export/jobs y consume SSE en /api/export/jobs/:jobId/events para actualizar modal de progreso (reducer en apps/web/src/exportJobState.ts). Export real se ejecuta en exportService.ts: obtiene detalles de videos, corre pipeline de transcript (captions en transcriptService.ts + fallback ASR local en transcriptPipeline.ts/localAsrService.ts), descarga miniaturas, escribe exports/<canal>/channel.json y limpia temporales exports/.tmp/<jobId>. Pipeline robusto: transcript nunca rompe export (si falla queda "" y warning). ASR usa worker Python apps/api/scripts/asr_worker.py con faster-whisper + yt-dlp y requiere ffmpeg en PATH. Config de entorno en apps/api/src/config/env.ts y ejemplo en apps/api/.env.example.

API contracts actuales: GET /health -> {ok:true}; POST /analyze body {sourceInput,timeframe(1m|6m|1y)} -> AnalyzeResult {channelId,channelName,sourceInput,timeframe,warnings,videos[]}; POST /export y POST /export/jobs comparten body {channelId(UC...),channelName,sourceInput,timeframe,selectedVideoIds[]} (sync devuelve {folderPath,warnings,exportedCount}, async devuelve {jobId}); GET /export/jobs/:jobId -> ExportJobState {status queued|running|done|failed, completed,total,warnings,exportPath?,error?,videoStages}. SSE /export/jobs/:jobId/events emite: job_started{total}, video_progress{videoId,stage,percent?}, job_progress{completed,total}, warning{videoId?,message}, job_done{exportPath}, job_failed{message}. stage enum: queue/downloading_audio/transcribing/downloading_thumbnail/writing_json/done/warning/failed. Export schema actual (channel.json): {channelName,channelId,sourceInput,timeframe,videos[{videoId,title,viewCount,publishedAt,thumbnailPath,transcript,transcriptStatus?}]}. Nota de versión: runtime no incluye exportVersion; tratar como implícita 1.0 y recomendado agregar exportVersion para compatibilidad futura.

Runbook rápido: 1) pnpm install 2) copiar apps/api/.env.example -> apps/api/.env y setear YOUTUBE_API_KEY 3) opcional recomendado ASR: pnpm asr:setup && pnpm asr:check 4) pnpm dev (web:5173 con proxy /api a 3001, api:3001) 5) pnpm test. Env opcionales relevantes: PORT, TRANSCRIPT_LANG, LOCAL_ASR_ENABLED, LOCAL_ASR_MODEL, LOCAL_ASR_COMPUTE_TYPE, LOCAL_ASR_LANGUAGE, LOCAL_ASR_BEAM_SIZE, LOCAL_ASR_MAX_CONCURRENCY, LOCAL_ASR_TIMEOUT_SEC, YOUTUBE_AUDIO_DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT_SEC, ASR_PYTHON_PATH. Resolución python ASR: ASR_PYTHON_PATH > .venv-asr/bin/python (Unix) o .venv-asr/Scripts/python.exe (Windows) > python3/python fallback. Troubleshooting: Missing YOUTUBE_API_KEY -> revisar apps/api/.env; faster_whisper import fail -> rerun asr:setup/asr:check o LOCAL_ASR_ENABLED=false; ffmpeg not found -> instalar ffmpeg y agregar PATH; SSE desconectado -> validar API health y proxy en apps/web/vite.config.ts. Windows: usar .venv-asr\Scripts\python.exe y Activate.ps1; ffmpeg.exe debe estar en PATH.

ytai-analizer es un monorepo pnpm (workspace apps/*) con apps/api (Fastify + TypeScript) y apps/web (React + Vite). Entry points principales: apps/api/src/server.ts y apps/web/src/main.tsx + apps/web/src/App.tsx. Flujo principal: AnalyzePage llama POST /api/analyze; luego export async con POST /api/export/jobs y seguimiento SSE en /api/export/jobs/:jobId/events, estado cliente en apps/web/src/exportJobState.ts. Export real ocurre en apps/api/src/services/exportService.ts: toma metadata de YouTube, pipeline transcript captions-first con fallback ASR local (transcriptPipeline.ts + localAsrService.ts + asr_worker.py), descarga thumbnails y escribe artifacts en exports/<canal>/. Formato principal de salida: channel.json con exportVersion 1.1, manifest.json, raw/*, derived/*, logs/* y cache en .cache/index.json. Dashboard de proyectos usa /projects y /projects/:projectId* leyendo exports/ mediante projectsService.ts. Documentación actualizada en docs/AI_CONTEXT.md, docs/DATA_CONTRACTS.md y docs/REPO_MAP.md.

Contratos API actuales (server.ts): GET /health; POST /analyze; POST /export; POST /export/jobs; GET /export/jobs/:jobId; GET /export/jobs/:jobId/events (SSE); GET /projects; GET /projects/:projectId; GET /projects/:projectId/videos; GET /projects/:projectId/videos/:videoId?maxSegments&truncateChars; GET /projects/:projectId/artifacts/{playbook,templates,channel_models}; GET /projects/:projectId/thumb/:videoId. Body de export/analyze validado con zod (timeframe 1m|6m|1y, channelId UC...). SSE events: job_started, video_progress, job_progress, warning, job_done, job_failed; video stages: queue/downloading_audio/transcribing/downloading_thumbnail/writing_json/done/warning/failed. Export schema principal: exports/<canal>/channel.json (ExportPayload) incluye exportVersion=1.1, exportedAt, channel metadata, timeframeResolved y videos[{videoId,title,viewCount,publishedAt,thumbnailPath,transcript,transcriptStatus?,transcriptSource?,transcriptPath?}]. Manifest: exports/<canal>/manifest.json con counts, warnings y artifacts. Raw: raw/channel.json, raw/videos.jsonl, raw/transcripts/<videoId>.jsonl (meta + segment). Derived: derived/video_features/<videoId>.json y derived/channel_models.json. Cache: .cache/index.json (cache.index.v1).

Runbook rápido: 1) pnpm install 2) configurar apps/api/.env desde apps/api/.env.example (requerido: YOUTUBE_API_KEY) 3) opcional ASR local: pnpm asr:setup && pnpm asr:check 4) pnpm dev (web 5173 con proxy /api a 3001; api 3001) 5) pnpm test. Variables opcionales clave: PORT, TRANSCRIPT_LANG, OPENAI_API_KEY, LOCAL_ASR_ENABLED, LOCAL_ASR_MODEL, LOCAL_ASR_COMPUTE_TYPE, LOCAL_ASR_LANGUAGE, LOCAL_ASR_BEAM_SIZE, LOCAL_ASR_MAX_CONCURRENCY, LOCAL_ASR_TIMEOUT_SEC, YOUTUBE_AUDIO_DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT_SEC, ASR_PYTHON_PATH, EXPORT_*_CONCURRENCY, EXPORT_FAIL_FAST, AUTO_GEN_*, THUMB_OCR_ENABLED, THUMB_OCR_LANGS, THUMB_VISION_DOWNSCALE_WIDTH. Resolución Python ASR: ASR_PYTHON_PATH -> .venv-asr/bin/python (Unix) o .venv-asr/Scripts/python.exe (Windows) -> python3/python fallback. Troubleshooting: Missing YOUTUBE_API_KEY (revisar .env), ffmpeg not found (instalar y añadir PATH), faster_whisper import fail (repetir asr:setup/asr:check), desconexión SSE (validar /health y proxy en apps/web/vite.config.ts). Windows: usar .venv-asr\\Scripts\\python.exe, Activate.ps1 y ffmpeg.exe en PATH.

OCR step in ytai-analizer uses tesseract.js with worker-per-language, sha1 cache/in-flight dedupe, scheduler queue type ocr via EXPORT_OCR_CONCURRENCY, cache invalidation by ocrConfigHash (THUMB_OCR_LANGS + THUMB_VISION_DOWNSCALE_WIDTH), persisted in derived.video_features thumbnailFeatures.deterministic, UI exposure via ProjectDetail tooltip with Tailwind-based lightweight design primitives.

ytai-analizer (ctx 2026-03-06) es un monorepo pnpm apps/* con API Fastify TS en apps/api/src/server.ts y web React/Vite TS en apps/web/src/App.tsx, apps/web/src/pages/AnalyzePage.tsx, apps/web/src/pages/ProjectsList.tsx y apps/web/src/pages/ProjectDetail.tsx. Con pnpm dev el root efectivo de exports es apps/api/exports porque los services usan path.resolve(process.cwd(),'exports'). Flujo central: POST /analyze -> selección UI -> POST /export/jobs -> SSE GET /export/jobs/:jobId/events -> reducer apps/web/src/exportJobState.ts -> exportService.ts escribe channel.json, manifest.json, raw/*, derived/video_features/*.json, derived/channel_models.json y logs/*. El pipeline transcript actual es ASR local efectivo (transcriptPipeline + localAsrService + asr_worker.py), no captions-first; si falla, el export sigue con warning y transcript vacío. Projects dashboard lee apps/api/exports/* vía projectsService. Bundle y artifacts analysis/playbook/templates requieren correr antes POST /export/rerun-orchestrator, porque el export principal salta el orchestrator.

API vigente (apps/api/src/server.ts): GET /health; POST /analyze; POST /export; POST /export/jobs; GET /export/jobs/:jobId; GET /export/jobs/:jobId/events; POST /export/rerun-orchestrator; GET /projects; GET /projects/:projectId; GET /projects/:projectId/videos; GET /projects/:projectId/videos/:videoId; POST /projects/:projectId/videos/:videoId/rerun/:feature; POST /projects/:projectId/rerun/features; GET /projects/:projectId/rerun/features/jobs/:jobId; GET /projects/:projectId/rerun/features/jobs/:jobId/events; POST /projects/:projectId/rerun/thumbnails; GET /projects/:projectId/rerun/thumbnails/jobs/:jobId; GET /projects/:projectId/rerun/thumbnails/jobs/:jobId/events; GET /projects/:projectId/bundle/meta; GET /projects/:projectId/bundle; GET /projects/:projectId/exports/:exportJobId/bundle; GET /projects/:projectId/artifacts/playbook|templates|channel_models; GET /projects/:projectId/thumb/:videoId. SSE export events: job_started, video_progress(stage queue|downloading_audio|transcribing|downloading_thumbnail|writing_json|done|warning|failed), job_progress, warning, job_done, job_failed. Export schema: exportVersion=1.1; channel.json=ExportPayload; manifest.json=ExportManifestV1; raw/channel.json=RawChannelExportV1; raw/videos.jsonl=RawVideoRecordV1; raw/transcripts/<videoId>.jsonl mezcla meta+segment; derived/video_features schemaVersion=derived.video_features.v1; derived/channel_models schemaVersion=derived.channel_models.v1; analysis/playbook.json schemaVersion=analysis.playbook.v1; derived/templates.json schemaVersion=derived.templates.v1; bundle.json schemaVersion=analysis.cross_channel_bundle.v1.

Runbook rápido: 1) pnpm install 2) cp apps/api/.env.example apps/api/.env 3) configurar YOUTUBE_API_KEY 4) pnpm asr:setup 5) pnpm asr:check 6) pnpm dev 7) pnpm test. API dev: http://localhost:3001/health. Web dev: http://localhost:5173 con proxy /api. Env requeridas: YOUTUBE_API_KEY. Opcionales clave: OPENAI_API_KEY (LLM/orchestrator), LOCAL_ASR_*, ASR_PYTHON_PATH, OCR_PYTHON_PATH, THUMB_OCR_*, AUTO_GEN_*, EXPORT_*_CONCURRENCY, EXPORT_BUNDLE_*, PORT. Runtime: Node>=20, pnpm 10, Python 3.10+, ffmpeg en PATH, venv repo .venv-asr. Windows: .venv-asr\\Scripts\\python.exe y .\\.venv-asr\\Scripts\\Activate.ps1; ASR_PYTHON_PATH/OCR_PYTHON_PATH pueden apuntar ahí. Troubleshooting: falta YOUTUBE_API_KEY -> analyze/export falla; ASR imports fallan -> pnpm asr:setup && pnpm asr:check; ffmpeg missing -> instalar y validar ffmpeg --version; SSE cae -> revisar /health y apps/web/vite.config.ts; bundle 409 -> ejecutar rerun-orchestrator para generar analysis/orchestrator_input.json; cambiar cwd de la API cambia el root de exports.
